protocol.name: aether_surface_effects_v1
protocol.copyright:

interface.name: aether_surface_effects_manager_v1
interface.description:
This global interface is the entry point for the surface-effects protocol. Clients bind it via wl_registry and use it to obtain an aether_surface_effects_v1 object for any wl_surface they own.
Through the per-surface object the client can submit a "region map": an ordered set of axis-aligned rectangles, each tagged with a bitmask of desired visual effects (blur, shadow, …). On commit() the compositor materialises those effects as scene-graph nodes placed inside the surface's scene tree, so they are clipped and transformed exactly like the surface itself.
Coordinates supplied for regions are in surface-local pixels (i.e. relative to the top-left corner of the wl_surface).

request.name: destroy
request.description: Destroys the manager. All aether_surface_effects_v1 objects previously created by this manager remain valid.

request.name: get_surface_effects

description.summary: create a surface-effects controller for a surface

request.description:
Create an aether_surface_effects_v1 for the given wl_surface. The surface must be owned by the calling client.
It is a protocol error to create more than one aether_surface_effects_v1 for the same wl_surface while the previous one is still alive.

arg.name: surface
arg.summary: the surface to attach effects to

interface.name: aether_surface_effects_v1

description.summary: compositor effects controller for one surface

interface.description:
Manages a collection of effect regions attached to a single wl_surface.
Changes to regions (add_region, region geometry / params) are double-buffered: they take effect only when commit() is called. The compositor replies with the committed event once it has applied the new region map.
When the surface is destroyed all its effect regions are automatically removed.

enum.name: effect
enum.description: Each value represents one visual effect that can be requested for a region. Multiple effects may be OR-ed together.

entry.name: already_constructed
entry.summary: a surface_effects object already exists for this surface

entry.name: bad_surface
entry.summary: the surface is not owned by this client

entry.name: bad_region
entry.summary: region has invalid dimensions (width or height ≤ 0)

request.name: destroy
request.description: Destroys the controller and removes all associated effect regions from the compositor scene. All child aether_effect_region_v1 objects become inert.

request.name: add_region

description.summary: add a new effect region (pending until commit)

request.description:
Register a new axis-aligned rectangle in surface-local coordinates and request one or more visual effects for it.
The region is pending until commit() is called. Coordinates are in surface-local pixels. Width and height must be greater than 0.
Returns a new aether_effect_region_v1 that can be used to update the region's geometry or per-effect parameters before committing.

request.name: commit
request.description:
Atomically apply all pending add_region / set_geometry / set_effects / set_*_params changes. The compositor tears down the current scene nodes and rebuilds them from the new region list.
The compositor sends the committed event once the new nodes are in place.

event.name: committed

description.summary: effects have been applied by the compositor

event.description: Sent after each commit() once the compositor has materialised the new region map. Clients may use this as a synchronisation point.

interface.name: aether_effect_region_v1
interface.description:
Represents one axis-aligned rectangle for which the client has requested compositor-side visual effects.
All setter requests are pending until the parent surface-effects object's commit() is called.

request.name: destroy

description.summary: remove this effect region (pending until commit)

request.description: Mark this region for removal. The compositor will destroy the corresponding scene nodes on the next commit().

request.name: set_geometry
request.description: Change the axis-aligned bounding box of this region in surface-local pixels. Width and height must be greater than 0. Takes effect on the next commit().

request.name: set_effects
request.description: Replace the OR-ed effect bitmask for this region. Takes effect on the next commit().

request.name: set_blur_params
request.description:
Adjust blur-specific rendering hints for this region.
ignore_transparent: when non-zero the compositor will skip blur rendering in fully transparent sub-areas of the region (saves GPU time for irregularly shaped glass panes).
Takes effect on the next commit().

arg.name: ignore_transparent
arg.summary: 1 = skip blur under fully transparent pixels

request.name: set_shadow_params
request.description:
Adjust shadow-specific rendering for this region.
blur_sigma controls the Gaussian spread of the shadow in pixels. color_argb is a packed 32-bit ARGB colour (0xAARRGGBB) for the shadow tint.
Takes effect on the next commit().
